My friend Jason works as an accounting manager at Foodpanda. If he hadn't taken the CPA exam three years ago, he wouldn't be working as a manager now. If he had pursued a career in sales rather than accounting his salary would be much lower now. If it hadn't been for his uncle's referral, his career wouldn't take off now and he wouldn't be earning a lot of money. Jason has been having a crush on this girl named Joyce for eight years but Joyce has a boyfriend. His friend said "That's totally fair. She's quite attractive" But he's beginning to realise he has no place in her scheme of things. He's just being a doormat so I told him to forget her. She's just not worth it. His mother said "you'll be better off without her" His uncle too said "you would be better off without her" He's a science fiction fan. He said "If syarahuos really would exist I would quit my job and spend the rest of my life roaming the universe" Recently my sister married her childhood sweetheart. But my father felt she was marrying beneath her. Myauntie too feels her husband is beneath her. Two months ago Jason was away on a business trip to Hokkaido. After his trip, I said "If you should go there again can you get me a pack of white lover cookies please?" Jason is a computer expert. His cousin has to wrote a report which is due on Tuesday bit ahes having problems with her computer. If Jason will go and fix her computer, his cousin will be so thankful for his help. His cousin also has exams next Monday so she's better off revising over the weekend. Jason is a kickboxing fan. His favourite fighter Dan has recently won his retirement fight. He's deeply grateful to his coaches amd thankful that he has got a job as a colour commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans wanna see Fred versus Randy. If Fred would sign a contract with the organisation, Dana will make the fight happen. After Randy read the terms and conditions of the contract, Dana's assistant said "If you would just sign here please" Jason's brother is a concierge in a hotel. I said "If it'll make you happy I'll come to stay for a night as company for you while your colleagues are away." As I'm fascinated by the science of starships I'm gonna ask Professor Chow about it. I'm gonna wait outside the lecture hall at twenty five of six. He'll have finished his lecture. I thought about phoning him at ten after three but my friend said "Don't phone him now. He won't have finished his lecture yet." It's true that he wouldn't have finished teaching yet. Jason gave a party at his place last Tuesday. As some of us wanted to watch the news I said "If I could just turn on the television please" He then said "Sure. If you would switch to the news channel" I saw Joey's concerts live twice at the Hong Kong Coliseum last year which were absolutely incredible and unforgettable. The first time I saw her concert, we were late. I remember I said "Look at the time. The concert will have begun." It was twenty five after eight. The concert would've started by then.
